Program

It aims to train health personnel who can make Prosthesis for individuals who have lost their arms and legs for various reasons, and Orthosis (assistive devices) for patients with various disorders of the musculoskeletal system to continue their daily lives in accordance with the anatomical and physiological structure.

In Üsküdar University Prosthetics-Orthotics Workshop; It is ensured that students have knowledge about the recognition and use of pure and fixture materials that they will use in their professional lives. The applications

in the Prosthetic Orthotics Workshop

contribute to the development of students' hand skills.

Materials Used in Prosthetic Orthotics Workshop

In Üsküdar University Prosthetic Orthotics Workshop; materials used in prosthesis (artificial organs), Orthotics materials, Welding machines, lathe grinding, milling machines, Drill machine, soldering iron and soldering iron drills, Lathe pens, Measuring and control instruments (Calipers, micrometers), Marking tools, planes, scraper, saw, Glue, plasters, wraps, sanding stones, files, screws.

Prosthetic Orthotics Workshop

There are two large workbenches, four pipe vises and twenty-four flat vises.

Features that Prosthetic Orthotics Technician should have

- Those who want to be

Prosthetics

and Orthotics Technician; They should have the ability to perceive hand and finger skills, shape and space relationships.

- People who will work in this profession should not be allergic to dust and chemicals.

- They must be meticulous and careful people.

- Since the execution of the profession is done with tools such as lathe, file, drill, etc., it requires physical strength and endurance.

This laboratory is used by the departments listed below.

Occupational Therapy Department

Orthotics Prosthetics Department
